Package com.rays.config

Class JWTUtil

java.lang.Object
com.rays.config.JWTUtil
@Component public class JWTUtil extends Object
Utility class for creating, validating, and parsing JWT tokens. Implements a custom JWT mechanism using HMAC-SHA256 signature.
Author:
Saket

    • jwtSecret

      @Value("${jwt.secret}") private String jwtSecret

  • Constructor Details

    • JWTUtil

      public JWTUtil()

  • Method Details

    • generateToken

      public String generateToken(Long userId, String loginId, String role) throws Exception
      Generates a JWT token for the given user details.
      Parameters:
      userId - User ID
      loginId - Login ID (used as subject)
      role - User role
      Returns:
      Signed JWT token string
      Throws:
      Exception - if token generation fails

    • validateToken

      public boolean validateToken(String token, String expectedLoginId) throws Exception
      Validates a JWT token and checks signature, subject, and expiration.
      Parameters:
      token - JWT token
      expectedLoginId - Expected login ID to match
      Returns:
      true if token is valid
      Throws:
      Exception - if validation fails

    • extractLoginId

      public String extractLoginId(String token)
      Extracts login ID (subject) from JWT token.
      Parameters:
      token - JWT token
      Returns:
      login ID

    • extractUserId

      public Long extractUserId(String token)
      Extracts user ID from JWT token.
      Parameters:
      token - JWT token
      Returns:
      user ID

    • extractRole

      public String extractRole(String token)
      Extracts role from JWT token.
      Parameters:
      token - JWT token
      Returns:
      user role

    • isTokenExpired

      private boolean isTokenExpired(String payloadJson)
      Checks whether token is expired based on "exp" claim.
      Parameters:
      payloadJson - decoded JWT payload
      Returns:
      true if expired

    • extractField

      private String extractField(String json, String field)
      Extracts a field value from JSON string.
      Parameters:
      json - JSON payload
      field - field name
      Returns:
      value as String

    • sign

      private String sign(String data, String key) throws Exception
      Generates HMAC-SHA256 signature.
      Parameters:
      data - data to sign
      key - secret key
      Returns:
      base64 encoded signature
      Throws:
      Exception - if signing fails

    • encodeUrl

      private String encodeUrl(String data)
      Encodes string into Base64 URL-safe format.
      Parameters:
      data - input string
      Returns:
      encoded string

    • encodeUrl

      private String encodeUrl(byte[] data)
      Encodes byte array into Base64 URL-safe format.
      Parameters:
      data - input bytes
      Returns:
      encoded string

    • decode

      private String decode(String data)
      Decodes Base64 URL-safe string.
      Parameters:
      data - encoded string
      Returns:
      decoded string
